heading: Benefits additional to benefits under other laws
label: 2104 Benefits additional to benefits under other laws

children.label: a
children.text: Any individual who accepts the benefits of this chapter shall not by reason thereof be denied the benefits of chapter 37 of this title.

children.label: b
children.text: An individual eligible for assistance under shall not by reason of such eligibility be denied benefits for which such individual becomes eligible under or benefits relating to home health services under .section 2101(b) of this titlesection 2101(a) of this titlesection 1717(a)(2) of this title

children.label: c
children.text: The Secretary may not provide assistance to a veteran under this chapter if the Secretary determines such assistance would result in a duplication of benefits under this title to the veteran.
